title: SMSF Property Loan Broker Boronia | Lending Specialists
meta_description: Buying property through your SMSF in Boronia? Digital Finance Solutions compares SMSF lenders and structures the loan correctly. Free consult, same-day response
h1: SMSF Property Loan Broker in Boronia
hero_subtitle: Buying property through your self managed super fund involves stricter lending rules than a standard home loan. We structure it correctly from the start.
intro_paragraph: SMSF loans have different rules than personal borrowing. We help you understand the structure before you commit to a purchase.
criteria_1: Not every lender offers SMSF loans, and the ones that do assess them differently. We compare the panel that actually lends on this product.
criteria_2: Getting the loan structure wrong can create compliance issues with your fund. We work through this with you and your accountant.
criteria_3: Settlement timelines for SMSF loans can run longer than standard loans, so we build that into your purchase timeline from day one.
faq_q1: Can my SMSF borrow money to buy property?
faq_a1: Yes, a self managed super fund can borrow to buy property through a limited recourse borrowing arrangement, subject to strict compliance rules and lender criteria. We can walk you through what applies to your situation.
faq_q2: What deposit does an SMSF property loan need?
faq_a2: SMSF property loans generally require a larger deposit than standard home loans, and the exact amount depends on the lender and property type. We compare options based on your fund's position.
faq_q3: Do I need an accountant as well as a broker for this?
faq_a3: Yes, SMSF lending involves both lending compliance and superannuation compliance. We work alongside your accountant or can refer you to one if needed.
related_page_blurb: Need a broker for standard home loans in Boronia as well as SMSF lending?
cta_subtitle: Talk to us about whether an SMSF property loan suits your situation.
